name: CAI Voice (IMBE)
notes: One IMBE vocoder frame: U0-U7 (U0-U6 Golay/Hamming corrected, U7 unprotected) + error counts (Et/Er/E4/E1) + mute (M) + lost (L) + super-frame counter (SF, 2b) + CAI busy (B)

name: PCM Audio (G.711 μ-law)
notes: Analog transparent voice; 20 ms per block; E=0 (PCMU per RFC 3551)

name: Decoded Link Control Word
notes: PV2+ — full 12 code words decoded into constituent fields (LCO-specific)

name: Decoded Header Word
notes: PV2+ — 72-bit MI + AlgID + KID + MFID + TGID + NID

name: Voice Header Part 1
notes: First 18 Golay code words G0-G17 with status

name: Analog Start of Stream
notes: PV2+ — analog streams with CTCSS or CDCSS squelch codes

name: Start of Stream with NID
notes: 16-bit NID (NAC+DUID) + 4-bit error count; sent repeatedly with each LDU1 until PT=14 StrAck received

name: End of Stream
notes: Stream termination; sent 4× spaced 100 ms apart; station de-keys on EoS or after timeout (typ 4 s)

name: Receiver Report
notes: Per-receiver status: NO_SIGNAL / SELECTED / GOOD_P25 / GOOD_FM / BAD_P25 / BAD_FM / NOT_EQUIPPED / FAILED; multiple receivers per packet; sent on change + periodic (default 10 s)

name: Stream Acknowledge
notes: ACK for SoS; ensures reliable NID delivery
